name: Claude Pairing Coach
description: During the call, Claude fires a quiet macOS notification with a one-line nudge when your pairing session drifts into a known anti-pattern — backseat driving, a quiet pair, a silent driver, no goal set, no swaps. When the call ends, the same session writes a retro to pairing-evaluation.md: talk-time balance, which anti-patterns showed up with quotes, what worked, and one thing to practice next session. Based on Tuple's Pair Programming Guide.
